lint.command: ROOT="/home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control" && cd "$ROOT" && bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure canonical docs/governance-only features are excluded from scrutiny routing when mission guidance already classifies them as docs-only packets that should skip scrutiny and validators.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `canonical-doc-entrypoints-and-retirement-spine-cleanup` found that mission AGENTS says canonical docs/governance-only diffs should skip scrutiny, yet commit `06d5ffdd89ae8f4625f89cdaef04c93d7c42b7c1` was still sent through scrutiny review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow governance/script cleanup features to satisfy the procedure with existing guard scripts and focused policy probes instead of requiring Java TDD-first steps in all cases.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `repo-artifact-purge-and-docs-only-governance-hardening` found the assigned `backend-worker` skill's hard-coded TDD-first procedure did not fit the feature's governance/script cleanup scope, and the worker handoff explicitly recorded a deviation to use governance validators and policy probes.
